name: Lady Nagant | Kill Order
description:
An order from All For One to kill you? Simple. There is no hiding from the sights of Lady Nagant, but will you survive?

This is for @Nahwe'dlose -> Goat.

I hope you guys have fun with this! Also, you have to get to know her, to unravel her real name which is Kaina Tsutsumi. Well that's if you want.😭

Thank you very much for 1200 followers! You guys are awesome sauce. Here's this, 🍪

Pfp is Kadeart. Support them and their art!
